name: First State Bank
description_short: Winchester, OH's First State Bank at 19230 State Route 136 offers convenient branch banking services.
description_long:
First State Bank's Winchester, OH branch is located at 19230 State Route 136, operating as a standalone banking facility. This Winchester location serves customers seeking in-person banking services in the community.

The First State Bank branch serving Winchester, OH provides essential banking services including deposits, withdrawals, and account management. For specific details about hours and how to contact this Winchester location, customers are encouraged to reach out directly.

When visiting the First State Bank branch in Winchester, bring a valid government-issued ID for any transactions or account inquiries. This Winchester banking location is committed to serving the local community with reliable banking services.
services: Personal Checking Accounts with digital access
Student Checking Account with good grade rewards
Digital Banking platform for remote account management
Cash Management services for business customers
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Kasasa Cash Checking offers competitive 5.00% APY on balances up to $15,000
Student Checking Account with rewards for good grades incentivizes financial responsibility in young customers
Dual service model with both physical banking centers and digital/online banking options
Business-focused services including cash management, business checking, and savings accounts
Dedicated customer support (937-695-0331) during platform transitions and for account assistance
Personalized mortgage lending service emphasizing consultation and customer choice
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Ohio and Kentucky only
Recent e-statements platform transition caused temporary access disruptions and required customer contact for statement retrieval
Website lacks specific details on interest rates, fees, and APY for most account types beyond Kasasa Cash
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or trust services commonly offered by larger regional banks
best_for: Ohio and Kentucky residents seeking FDIC-insured checking and savings accounts with personalized service
Students interested in rewards-based checking accounts that incentivize academic achievement
Small business owners in rural communities needing comprehensive business banking and cash management services
Homebuyers in the service area looking for mortgage lenders with local presence and personalized lending consultations
diagnosis: First State Bank is best for Ohio and Kentucky residents wanting FDIC-insured community banking with competitive savings rates and personalized service, particularly small business owners and students. The main caveat is geographic limitation to two states and a recent e-statements platform transition that temporarily disrupted service accessibility.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First State Bank at 19230 State Route 136, Winchester, OH. Full-service branch banking for the local community.
